description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a dark charcoal gray fabric with a subtle woven texture. The sofa features two large, loose seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, complemented by two additional loose throw pillows for extra comfort. The armrests are gently flared and padded, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's overall silhouette, and sit at a medium height relative to the seat. The sofa stands on four slender, black metal legs that are slightly angled outward, giving it a light and airy appearance. The backrest is straight and continuous, providing full support across the width of the sofa, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living rooms.
description: A contemporary dark gray two-seater sofa with loose cushions, flared padded armrests, and slender black metal legs. The upholstery has a subtle woven texture, and the design is minimalist and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, two backrest cushions, and two throw pillows, with flared armrests and slender legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the outward flare of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the clean, uninterrupted upholstery across the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose backrest cushions, with two additional loose throw pillows; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Flared, padded armrests integrated into the sofa's silhouette, medium height relative to the seat, with a smooth, rounded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, exposed and minimalistic in style.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, with two loose backrest cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
